appSubtitle: ギター初見読譜トレーナー

welcome.title: Welcome to Guitar Sight-Reading Trainer
welcome.subtitle: Become a real guitarist who can read sheet music
welcome.description: Graduate from TAB sheets and develop the ability to sight-read Jazz standards
welcome.feature3: Gamification for fun and consistent practice

calibration.title: Mic Latency Check
calibration.description: We'll measure the timing difference (latency) between your guitar and microphone input. A PC with audio interface is strongly recommended.
calibration.instruction: Following the on-screen instructions, play one note on your guitar along with the click sound.
calibration.skipButton: Skip (can be done later in Settings)
calibration.skipNote: You can calibrate anytime from the Settings screen

placement.title: Placement Test
placement.description: We'll diagnose your sight-reading level and set the optimal starting level.
placement.question: Play this note

home.title: Dashboard
home.manualContent: Here you can check your practice progress, streak (consecutive practice days), EXP and level. Start practicing from each mode and build up your skills day by day.

master.title: Master Mode
master.description: Sight-read Jazz standards and earn titles
master.disclaimer: * The included songs are custom-arranged variations inspired by the originals for sight-reading practice, not exact transcriptions.
master.manualContent: Choose a Jazz standard and challenge your sight-reading. Difficulty comes in three levels: Beginner, Intermediate, and Advanced. Each song progresses through key stages (single key → 3 keys → 6 keys → all 12 keys), and clearing earns you a title. Transpositions happen automatically after each theme loop.

scale.title: Scale Practice Mode
scale.description: Build your fundamentals with 12 keys × multiple scales
scale.manualContent: Build your fundamentals with 12 keys × multiple scales. Watch your achievement grid fill up to stay motivated. Scale practice earns in-game currency.

titles.title: Title Collection
titles.manualContent: Clearing each song at each stage earns you a title. '?' shows titles not yet earned. Earning Menkyo on all songs unlocks the Grand Master title.

settings.title: Settings
settings.calibrationNote: You can calibrate anytime from Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This action cannot be undone.
settings.manualContent: Manage settings for language, metronome, microphone, and animations. Export/Import data to backup or transfer your progress.

items.title: Items
items.noteHintDesc: Display note names as a faint overlay on all notes
items.intervalHintDesc: Display interval numbers from the root on all notes
items.slowStartDesc: First 4 bars play at 70% BPM, gradually returning to full tempo
items.comboSaveDesc: Keep combo one stage back instead of breaking it
items.noteSkipDesc: Auto-advance to next note when stuck

metronome.backbeatOnlyDesc: Backbeat Only Mode: Mutes main beats and plays only the backbeats (&). An advanced rhythm training technique effective for developing jazz feel.

errors.micPermission: Microphone access denied. Please check your browser settings.
